title: Trout Toastie
description: A fresh, crispy Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring trout on toasted bread, ideal for a festive dinner or snack with low-fat-friendly options.

ingredients.name: Fresh Trout Fillet
ingredients.notes: Choose a light-flavored variety like Alaskan salmon or tilapia if unavailable.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing on the trout fillet and bread.

instructions: Slice the trout fillet into thin strips and season lightly with salt and pepper.
Spread a mix of Dijon mustard, low-fat mayonnaise, lemon zest, olive oil, chopped fresh parsley leaves (and red chillies if using), in a bowl. Mix well until smooth.
Gently coat each trout strip with the prepared mixture and place on toasted bread slices. Arrange neatly on a baking tray lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle remaining olive oil over the trout-toasts and bake for about 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy, tossing occasionally to ensure even browning.
Serve hot as an appetizer, side dish, or snack.
